title: Ear and Eye on the Ice-White Whale

palette.divergence: silty pewter glacial water + ice-white whale + mint synthetic sonar + signal-gold lock + ink; not the prior dusk-indigo/copper or bone-tan/jade runs; only sharp saturated color is the synthetic sensor light

shape_language.grammar: rounded organic whale (living pole) vs sharp synthetic sensors (SatelliteEye angular body/wings/lens; ListeningMooring rigid cylinder + rings)

craft_advance.primary: WaterColumn underwater-light system in lib/lighting.tsx (god-rays, silt haze, caustics, marine snow)
craft_advance.supporting: SatelliteEye + ListeningMooring in lib/sensors.tsx; SmellRings repurposed as sonar, ScanReticle as the orbital lock

signature_shot: S4 orbital zoom: punch down through clouds, reticle clamps the white smudge = beluga
